description: OpsPal Essentials - Project-level settings with proactive agent routing
companyAnnouncements: 26 specialized agents for Salesforce and HubSpot automation
AI-generated outputs may contain errors — please validate results.
🚀 Salesforce Essentials (12 agents) | HubSpot Essentials (10 agents) | Cross-Platform (4 agents)
🔍 Use /agents to see all available agents

hooks.description: Sub-agent utilization booster - Prepends 'Using the appropriate sub-agents, runbooks, and tools' to encourage delegation to specialized agents
Session initialization - creates temp directories, checks agent reminders, and loads cross-session context

comments.hooks_info: Hooks run automatically at specific lifecycle events. UserPromptSubmit runs before each user request, SessionStart runs once per session.
comments.disable_hooks: To temporarily disable hooks, add 'disableAllHooks': true to this file
comments.hook_debugging: Hook output appears in ~/.claude/logs/debug.log (run with --debug flag)
comments.subagent_boost: UserPromptSubmit hook prepends 'Using the appropriate sub-agents, runbooks, and tools' to every message, maximizing delegation to specialized agents
comments.session_start: SessionStart hook creates required temp directories and loads session context
comments.essentials_edition: This is the free/open-source Essentials edition with 26 core agents. For advanced features (CPQ assessments, RevOps audits, automation conflict detection), see COMPARISON.md
